---
title: "Mona Lisa motif enrichment on B/E/M clusters"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
.rs.restartR()
```

```{r}
installed.packages()

```
```{r}
.libPaths()

```
```{r}
list.files("/home/derek.janssens/R/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu-library/4.4")

```
```{r}
install_path <- "/home/derek.janssens/R/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu-library/4.4"
#.libPaths(install_path)
#print(.libPaths(install_path))
#install.packages("devtools", lib = install_path)
#install.packages("Seurat", lib = install_path)
# Install ArchR
#if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("BiocManager", lib = install_path)
#devtools::install_github("GreenleafLab/ArchR", ref = "master", 
#1                         repos = BiocManager::repositories(), lib = install_path)
#install.packages("repr", lib = install_path)
#ArchR::installExtraPackages()
#devtools::install_github("immunogenomics/harmony", lib = install_path)
# Install GenomicRanges and rtracklayer if not already installed
#if (!requireNamespace("GenomicRanges", quietly = TRUE)) {
#  install.packages("BiocManager")
#  BiocManager::install("GenomicRanges")
#}
#if (!requireNamespace("rtracklayer", quietly = TRUE)) {
#  BiocManager::install("rtracklayer")
#}
#install.packages("viridis")

```

```{r}
#BiocManager::install(c("monaLisa","JASPAR2020","TFBSTools"), ask=FALSE, update=FALSE)
BiocManager::install(c("JASPAR2022"), ask=FALSE, update=FALSE)
```

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(monaLisa)
  library(GenomicRanges)
  library(rtracklayer)
  library(Biostrings)
})

```

```{r}
library(TFBSTools)
library(JASPAR2020)

opts <- list(species = 9606, all_versions = FALSE)
pfm_list <- getMatrixSet(JASPAR2020, opts)   # PFMatrixList

# Convert PFMatrixList -> PWMatrixList (robust)
pwm_list <- toPWM(pfm_list)

length(pwm_list)

```
```{r}
library(TFBSTools)
library(JASPAR2022)

opts <- list(species = 9606, all_versions = FALSE)
pfm_list <- getMatrixSet(JASPAR2022, opts)   # PFMatrixList

# Convert PFMatrixList -> PWMatrixList (robust)
pwm_list <- toPWM(pfm_list)

length(pwm_list)

```


```{r}
# Now check for key TFs

# Your explicit list
explicit_TFs <- c("MECOM", "GATA1", "ZFPM1","TAL1", "EBF1", "PAX5", "CEBPA", "RUNX1", "SPI1", "IKZF1", "BCL11A", "TCF3", "HOXA9", "HOXB5", "MEIS1")

# Choose which PWM list you're using
pwm_use <- pwm_curated
#pwm_use <- pwm_list

# Extract motif names + IDs
motif_name <- vapply(pwm_use, function(m) tryCatch(name(m), error=function(e) NA_character_), character(1))
motif_id   <- vapply(pwm_use, function(m) tryCatch(ID(m),   error=function(e) NA_character_), character(1))

# Match if ANY TF appears as a token in the motif name.
# This will catch e.g. "GATA1", "GATA1::TAL1", "CEBPA/CEBPB", etc.
pattern <- paste0("(^|[^A-Z0-9])(", paste(explicit_TFs, collapse="|"), ")([^A-Z0-9]|$)")
keep <- grepl(pattern, toupper(motif_name), perl=TRUE)

hits <- data.frame(
  motif_id   = motif_id[keep],
  motif_name = motif_name[keep],
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Sort nicely: first by TF order, then by name
hits$tf_hit <- vapply(hits$motif_name, function(nm) {
  nm_up <- toupper(nm)
  explicit_TFs[which.max(vapply(explicit_TFs, function(tf) grepl(tf, nm_up, fixed=TRUE), logical(1)))]
}, character(1))

hits <- hits[order(match(hits$tf_hit, explicit_TFs), hits$motif_name), ]

# Print results
print(hits, row.names = FALSE)

# Optional: just the unique motif names
cat("\nUnique motif names:\n")
cat(paste(unique(hits$motif_name), collapse="\n"), "\n")

```
```{r}
# ============================================================
# Build curated PWM set from JASPAR2022 (Human + Mouse)
# - Load human + mouse PFMs
# - Convert to PWMs
# - Collapse exact duplicates by "base ID" (e.g., MAxxxx)
#   * If both species present, prefer HUMAN
# - Prune near-redundant PWMs by similarity threshold (0.95)
#   * Prefer HUMAN; then prefer hematopoiesis TFs you care about
# - Save as RDS: JASPAR2022_human_mouse_curated_0.95_pwms.rds
# - Expose as pwm_list in environment
#
# Notes:
# - Similarity pruning uses monaLisa::findMotifHits() correlation-based distance
#   through motif similarity on PWMs via TFBSTools utilities.
# - If you already have your own similarity routine, you can swap that section.
# ============================================================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(TFBSTools)
  library(JASPAR2022)
  library(monaLisa)
})

# -----------------------------
# 0) Load PFMs for human + mouse
# -----------------------------
opts_hs <- list(species = 9606, all_versions = FALSE)
opts_mm <- list(species = 10090, all_versions = FALSE)

pfm_hs <- getMatrixSet(JASPAR2022, opts_hs)   # PFMatrixList
pfm_mm <- getMatrixSet(JASPAR2022, opts_mm)

message("PFMs loaded: human=", length(pfm_hs), " mouse=", length(pfm_mm),
        " total=", length(pfm_hs) + length(pfm_mm))

# Convert to PWMs
pwm_hs <- toPWM(pfm_hs)
pwm_mm <- toPWM(pfm_mm)

pwm_all <- c(pwm_hs, pwm_mm)

# -----------------------------
# Helpers
# -----------------------------
.base_id <- function(m) sub("\\..*$", "", ID(m))  # MAxxxx from MAxxxx.x

.is_human <- function(m) {
  # try to detect species from tags; fallback to FALSE if missing
  sp <- tryCatch(tags(m)[["species"]], error=function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(sp)) return(FALSE)
  any(grepl("\\b9606\\b", as.character(sp)))
}

.motif_name <- function(m) {
  nm <- tryCatch(name(m), error=function(e) "")
  if (is.null(nm) || nm == "") nm <- tryCatch(tags(m)[["name"]], error=function(e) "")
  if (is.null(nm)) nm <- ""
  as.character(nm)
}

# prioritize TFs by name substring (case-insensitive)
HEMA_TF_PRIORITY <- c(
  "MECOM","GATA1","GATA2","TAL1","EBF1","PAX5","CEBPA","CEBPB",
  "RUNX1","RUNX2","RUNX3","SPI1","PU.1","IKZF1","IKZF2","IKZF3",
  "TCF3","E2A","BCL11A","BCL11B","IRF4","IRF8","STAT5","STAT3",
  "NFKB","REL","BATF","JUN","FOS","AP1","ETS1","ELF1","ETV6"
)

.has_hema <- function(m) {
  nm <- toupper(.motif_name(m))
  any(vapply(HEMA_TF_PRIORITY, function(p) grepl(p, nm, ignore.case=TRUE), logical(1)))
}

# -----------------------------
# 1) Collapse by base ID, prefer human if duplicated
# -----------------------------
pwm_by_id <- split(pwm_all, vapply(pwm_all, .base_id, character(1)))

pick_one <- function(mots) {
  if (length(mots) == 1) return(mots[[1]])

  # rank: (1) has hematopoiesis TF name, (2) human, (3) keep first
  hema <- vapply(mots, .has_hema, logical(1))
  hum  <- vapply(mots, .is_human, logical(1))

  # score
  score <- (hema * 100L) + (hum * 10L)
  mots[[which.max(score)]]
}

pwm_base <- PWMatrixList(lapply(pwm_by_id, pick_one))
message("After base-ID collapse: ", length(pwm_base))

# -----------------------------
# 2) Similarity pruning at threshold=0.95
#    Strategy:
#    - Compute pairwise similarity using monaLisa motif distance
#    - Greedy prune: keep best-ranked motif in each similarity-connected cluster
# -----------------------------
SIM_THRESH <- 0.95

# Build ranking vector for greedy selection: hema > human > others
rank_score <- function(m) {
  (as.integer(.has_hema(m)) * 1000L) +
    (as.integer(.is_human(m)) * 100L)
}

# monaLisa provides motif similarity utilities via internal helpers;
# easiest robust path: use motifDistance() on PWMs if available
# If your installed monaLisa doesn't export motifDistance(), we'll fallback to TFBSTools::PWMSimilarity
get_sim <- function(a, b) {
  # Try TFBSTools similarity (Pearson correlation of aligned matrices)
  # Note: PWM similarity definitions vary; this gives a practical redundancy filter.
  suppressWarnings({
    tryCatch({
      as.numeric(PWMSimilarity(a, b, method="Pearson"))
    }, error=function(e) NA_real_)
  })
}

pwm_vec <- as.list(pwm_base)
n <- length(pwm_vec)

# compute similarity matrix (upper triangle) – O(n^2)
sim_mat <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow=n, ncol=n)
diag(sim_mat) <- 1
for (i in seq_len(n-1)) {
  for (j in (i+1):n) {
    sim <- get_sim(pwm_vec[[i]], pwm_vec[[j]])
    sim_mat[i, j] <- sim
    sim_mat[j, i] <- sim
  }
}

# greedy pruning
ord <- order(vapply(pwm_vec, rank_score, integer(1)), decreasing=TRUE)
keep <- rep(FALSE, n)
dropped <- rep(FALSE, n)

for (idx in ord) {
  if (dropped[idx]) next
  keep[idx] <- TRUE
  # drop all motifs too similar to this one (except itself)
  too_sim <- which(sim_mat[idx, ] >= SIM_THRESH)
  too_sim <- setdiff(too_sim, idx)
  dropped[too_sim] <- TRUE
}

pwm_curated <- PWMatrixList(pwm_vec[keep])
message("After similarity pruning (threshold=", SIM_THRESH, "): ", length(pwm_curated))

# optional: report how many curated motifs match hematopoiesis list
hema_count <- sum(vapply(as.list(pwm_curated), .has_hema, logical(1)))
message("Curated motifs with hematopoiesis TF names (approx match): ", hema_count)

# -----------------------------
# 3) Save + export
# -----------------------------
#saveRDS(pwm_curated, file = "JASPAR2022_human_mouse_curated_0.95_pwms.rds")
#message("Saved curated PWMs -> JASPAR2022_human_mouse_curated_0.95_pwms.rds")

# If you want it in your environment under the same variable name:
pwm_list <- pwm_curated
```


```{r}
# Save curated PWM list for reuse
saveRDS(pwm_curated, file = "JASPAR2022_human_mouse_curated_0.95_pwms.rds")
message("Saved curated PWMs -> JASPAR2022_human_mouse_curated_0.95_pwms.rds")

# If you want it in your environment under the same variable name:
pwm_list <- pwm_curated
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# MONA Lisa motif enrichment with per-group background
# JASPAR2022 PWMs
# Saves after each group completes + supports resume
# ============================================================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(rtracklayer)
  library(GenomicRanges)
  library(GenomeInfoDb)
  library(BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38)
  library(Biostrings)
  library(SummarizedExperiment)
  library(monaLisa)

  library(TFBSTools)
  library(JASPAR2022)
})

# -----------------------------
# 0) Motifs: JASPAR2022 -> PWM list
# -----------------------------
pwm_list <- readRDS("JASPAR2022_human_mouse_curated_0.95_pwms.rds")
message("Loaded curated PWMs: ", length(pwm_list))

# -----------------------------
# 1) Paths + IO
# -----------------------------
bed_dir <- "Cluster_beds_200bp_Final/Distal_R6/"

distal_universe_file   <- file.path(bed_dir, "Distal_control_200bp_030326.bed")
#promoter_universe_file <- file.path(bed_dir, "B_lineage_all_peaks_promoter_TSS2kb.bed")

if (!file.exists(distal_universe_file)) stop("Missing distal universe BED: ", distal_universe_file)
if (!file.exists(promoter_universe_file)) warning("Promoter universe BED not found (ok): ", promoter_universe_file)

outdir <- "MONALisa_Distal_200bp_Cluster_Test_Curated_JASPAR2022_Hs_Mm_Motifs_0.95_030326_Final_R6"
dir.create(outdir, showWarnings = FALSE)

# master result container (optional; we will still save per-group)
master_rds <- file.path(outdir, "ALL_groups_monaLisa_results.rds")

# -----------------------------
# Helpers
# -----------------------------
bed_to_gr <- function(f) {
  x <- read.table(f, sep = "\t", header = FALSE, comment.char = "",
                  stringsAsFactors = FALSE, quote = "")

  if (ncol(x) < 3) stop("BED has <3 columns: ", f)

  # keep only BED3
  x <- x[, 1:3]
  colnames(x) <- c("seqnames", "start0", "end")

  # BED is 0-based start; GRanges is 1-based start
  gr <- GenomicRanges::GRanges(
    seqnames = x$seqnames,
    ranges   = IRanges::IRanges(start = x$start0 + 1L, end = x$end)
  )

  GenomeInfoDb::seqlevelsStyle(gr) <- "UCSC"
  gr
}

keep_ucsc_std <- function(gr, keep_chr) {
  gr <- keepStandardChromosomes(gr, pruning.mode = "coarse")
  gr <- gr[as.character(seqnames(gr)) %in% keep_chr]
  sort(gr)
}

# Filter a GRanges by whether its extracted sequence is only A/C/G/T
filter_gr_acgt <- function(gr, genome) {
  if (length(gr) == 0) return(gr)
  s <- getSeq(genome, gr)
  keep <- grepl("^[ACGT]+$", as.character(s))
  gr[keep]
}

make_bg_for_fg <- function(fg, universe) {
  fg <- reduce(fg)
  bg <- setdiff(universe, fg, ignore.strand = TRUE)
  sort(bg)
}

se_to_table <- function(se) {
  data.frame(
    motif_id      = rowData(se)$motif.id,
    motif_name    = rowData(se)$motif.name,
    log2enr       = assay(se, "log2enr")[, "fg"],
    negLog10P     = assay(se, "negLog10P")[, "fg"],
    negLog10Padj  = assay(se, "negLog10Padj")[, "fg"],
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

# -----------------------------
# 2) Load genome + universe
# -----------------------------
genome <- BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38
keep_chr <- seqlevels(genome)

distal_universe <- bed_to_gr(distal_universe_file)
distal_universe <- keep_ucsc_std(distal_universe, keep_chr)
distal_universe <- reduce(distal_universe)
distal_universe <- sort(distal_universe)

message("Distal universe before ACGT filter: ", length(distal_universe))
distal_universe <- filter_gr_acgt(distal_universe, genome)
message("Distal universe after  ACGT filter: ", length(distal_universe))

# -----------------------------
# 3) Load feature-group beds (exclude universe beds)
# -----------------------------
beds <- list.files(bed_dir, pattern="\\.bed$", full.names=TRUE)
exclude_files <- c(distal_universe_file, promoter_universe_file)
fg_beds <- beds[!beds %in% exclude_files]

message("Found ", length(beds), " total BEDs")
message("Testing ", length(fg_beds), " feature-group BEDs")

fg_list <- setNames(lapply(fg_beds, bed_to_gr), sub("\\.bed$", "", basename(fg_beds)))
fg_list <- lapply(fg_list, keep_ucsc_std, keep_chr = keep_chr)

# -----------------------------
# 4) Run MONA Lisa per group, save after each
# -----------------------------
results <- list()

for (nm in names(fg_list)) {

  # Per-group output files
  rds_path <- file.path(outdir, paste0(nm, "_monaLisa.rds"))
  tsv_path <- file.path(outdir, paste0(nm, "_motif_enrichment.tsv"))

  # Resume: skip if already computed
  if (file.exists(rds_path)) {
    message("Skipping (already exists): ", nm)
    next
  }

  fg <- reduce(fg_list[[nm]])
  fg <- filter_gr_acgt(fg, genome)

  bg <- make_bg_for_fg(fg, distal_universe)
  bg <- filter_gr_acgt(bg, genome)

  cat("\n--- ", nm, " ---\n", sep = "")
  cat("  fg peaks: ", length(fg), "\n", sep = "")
  cat("  bg peaks: ", length(bg), "\n", sep = "")

  if (length(fg) < 50) {
    warning("Skipping ", nm, " because fg has <50 peaks.")
    next
  }
  if (length(bg) < 200) {
    warning("Skipping ", nm, " because bg is very small.")
    next
  }

  # sequences
  fg_seq <- getSeq(genome, fg)
  bg_seq <- getSeq(genome, bg)

  seqs <- c(fg_seq, bg_seq)
  bins <- factor(
    c(rep("fg", length(fg_seq)), rep("bg", length(bg_seq))),
    levels = c("fg", "bg")
  )

  # Run enrichment (wrap in tryCatch so a single failure doesn't kill the whole run)
  se <- tryCatch({
    calcBinnedMotifEnrR(
      seqs = seqs,
      bins = bins,
      pwmL = pwm_list,
      background = "otherBins",
      test = "fisher",
      verbose = TRUE
    )
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("FAILED: ", nm, " -> ", conditionMessage(e))
    return(NULL)
  })

  if (is.null(se)) next

  # Save immediately (RDS)
  saveRDS(se, file = rds_path)
  message("Saved: ", rds_path)

  # Export TSV immediately
  tab <- se_to_table(se)
  tab <- tab[order(-tab$negLog10Padj), ]
  write.table(tab, file = tsv_path, sep = "\t", quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE)
  message("Wrote: ", tsv_path)

  # Optionally also keep in-memory + save master occasionally
  results[[nm]] <- se

  # Save master snapshot after each group (safe against session loss)
  saveRDS(results, file = master_rds)
  message("Updated master: ", master_rds)
}

message("Done. Outputs in: ", outdir)

```







```{r}
# ============================================================
# MONA Lisa motif enrichment with per-group background
# JASPAR2022 PWMs
# Saves after each group completes + supports resume
# ============================================================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(rtracklayer)
  library(GenomicRanges)
  library(GenomeInfoDb)
  library(BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38)
  library(Biostrings)
  library(SummarizedExperiment)
  library(monaLisa)

  library(TFBSTools)
  library(JASPAR2022)
})

# -----------------------------
# 0) Motifs: JASPAR2022 -> PWM list
# -----------------------------
pwm_list <- readRDS("JASPAR2022_human_mouse_curated_0.95_pwms.rds")
message("Loaded curated PWMs: ", length(pwm_list))

# -----------------------------
# 1) Paths + IO
# -----------------------------
bed_dir <- "Cluster_beds_200bp_Final/Promoter_R6/"

distal_universe_file   <- file.path(bed_dir, "Promoter_control_200bp_030326.bed")
#promoter_universe_file <- file.path(bed_dir, "B_lineage_all_peaks_promoter_TSS2kb.bed")

if (!file.exists(distal_universe_file)) stop("Missing distal universe BED: ", distal_universe_file)
if (!file.exists(promoter_universe_file)) warning("Promoter universe BED not found (ok): ", promoter_universe_file)

outdir <- "MONALisa_Promoter_200bp_Cluster_Test_Curated_JASPAR2022_Hs_Mm_Motifs_0.95_030326_Final_R6"
dir.create(outdir, showWarnings = FALSE)

# master result container (optional; we will still save per-group)
master_rds <- file.path(outdir, "ALL_groups_monaLisa_results.rds")

# -----------------------------
# Helpers
# -----------------------------
bed_to_gr <- function(f) {
  x <- read.table(f, sep = "\t", header = FALSE, comment.char = "",
                  stringsAsFactors = FALSE, quote = "")

  if (ncol(x) < 3) stop("BED has <3 columns: ", f)

  # keep only BED3
  x <- x[, 1:3]
  colnames(x) <- c("seqnames", "start0", "end")

  # BED is 0-based start; GRanges is 1-based start
  gr <- GenomicRanges::GRanges(
    seqnames = x$seqnames,
    ranges   = IRanges::IRanges(start = x$start0 + 1L, end = x$end)
  )

  GenomeInfoDb::seqlevelsStyle(gr) <- "UCSC"
  gr
}

keep_ucsc_std <- function(gr, keep_chr) {
  gr <- keepStandardChromosomes(gr, pruning.mode = "coarse")
  gr <- gr[as.character(seqnames(gr)) %in% keep_chr]
  sort(gr)
}

# Filter a GRanges by whether its extracted sequence is only A/C/G/T
filter_gr_acgt <- function(gr, genome) {
  if (length(gr) == 0) return(gr)
  s <- getSeq(genome, gr)
  keep <- grepl("^[ACGT]+$", as.character(s))
  gr[keep]
}

make_bg_for_fg <- function(fg, universe) {
  fg <- reduce(fg)
  bg <- setdiff(universe, fg, ignore.strand = TRUE)
  sort(bg)
}

se_to_table <- function(se) {
  data.frame(
    motif_id      = rowData(se)$motif.id,
    motif_name    = rowData(se)$motif.name,
    log2enr       = assay(se, "log2enr")[, "fg"],
    negLog10P     = assay(se, "negLog10P")[, "fg"],
    negLog10Padj  = assay(se, "negLog10Padj")[, "fg"],
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

# -----------------------------
# 2) Load genome + universe
# -----------------------------
genome <- BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38
keep_chr <- seqlevels(genome)

distal_universe <- bed_to_gr(distal_universe_file)
distal_universe <- keep_ucsc_std(distal_universe, keep_chr)
distal_universe <- reduce(distal_universe)
distal_universe <- sort(distal_universe)

message("Distal universe before ACGT filter: ", length(distal_universe))
distal_universe <- filter_gr_acgt(distal_universe, genome)
message("Distal universe after  ACGT filter: ", length(distal_universe))

# -----------------------------
# 3) Load feature-group beds (exclude universe beds)
# -----------------------------
beds <- list.files(bed_dir, pattern="\\.bed$", full.names=TRUE)
exclude_files <- c(distal_universe_file, promoter_universe_file)
fg_beds <- beds[!beds %in% exclude_files]

message("Found ", length(beds), " total BEDs")
message("Testing ", length(fg_beds), " feature-group BEDs")

fg_list <- setNames(lapply(fg_beds, bed_to_gr), sub("\\.bed$", "", basename(fg_beds)))
fg_list <- lapply(fg_list, keep_ucsc_std, keep_chr = keep_chr)

# -----------------------------
# 4) Run MONA Lisa per group, save after each
# -----------------------------
results <- list()

for (nm in names(fg_list)) {

  # Per-group output files
  rds_path <- file.path(outdir, paste0(nm, "_monaLisa.rds"))
  tsv_path <- file.path(outdir, paste0(nm, "_motif_enrichment.tsv"))

  # Resume: skip if already computed
  if (file.exists(rds_path)) {
    message("Skipping (already exists): ", nm)
    next
  }

  fg <- reduce(fg_list[[nm]])
  fg <- filter_gr_acgt(fg, genome)

  bg <- make_bg_for_fg(fg, distal_universe)
  bg <- filter_gr_acgt(bg, genome)

  cat("\n--- ", nm, " ---\n", sep = "")
  cat("  fg peaks: ", length(fg), "\n", sep = "")
  cat("  bg peaks: ", length(bg), "\n", sep = "")

  if (length(fg) < 50) {
    warning("Skipping ", nm, " because fg has <50 peaks.")
    next
  }
  if (length(bg) < 200) {
    warning("Skipping ", nm, " because bg is very small.")
    next
  }

  # sequences
  fg_seq <- getSeq(genome, fg)
  bg_seq <- getSeq(genome, bg)

  seqs <- c(fg_seq, bg_seq)
  bins <- factor(
    c(rep("fg", length(fg_seq)), rep("bg", length(bg_seq))),
    levels = c("fg", "bg")
  )

  # Run enrichment (wrap in tryCatch so a single failure doesn't kill the whole run)
  se <- tryCatch({
    calcBinnedMotifEnrR(
      seqs = seqs,
      bins = bins,
      pwmL = pwm_list,
      background = "otherBins",
      test = "fisher",
      verbose = TRUE
    )
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("FAILED: ", nm, " -> ", conditionMessage(e))
    return(NULL)
  })

  if (is.null(se)) next

  # Save immediately (RDS)
  saveRDS(se, file = rds_path)
  message("Saved: ", rds_path)

  # Export TSV immediately
  tab <- se_to_table(se)
  tab <- tab[order(-tab$negLog10Padj), ]
  write.table(tab, file = tsv_path, sep = "\t", quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE)
  message("Wrote: ", tsv_path)

  # Optionally also keep in-memory + save master occasionally
  results[[nm]] <- se

  # Save master snapshot after each group (safe against session loss)
  saveRDS(results, file = master_rds)
  message("Updated master: ", master_rds)
}

message("Done. Outputs in: ", outdir)

```


```{r}
# ============================================================
# GC percentage per BED interval + rank-ordered boxplot by median
# Print plot only in RStudio
# ============================================================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(GenomicRanges)
  library(GenomeInfoDb)
  library(BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38)
  library(Biostrings)
  library(ggplot2)
})

# -----------------------------
# 1) Input
# -----------------------------
bed_dir <- "Cluster_beds_200bp_Final/Promoter_R6/"

# -----------------------------
# 2) Genome
# -----------------------------
genome <- BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38
keep_chr <- seqlevels(genome)

# -----------------------------
# Helpers
# -----------------------------
bed_to_gr <- function(f) {
  x <- read.table(
    f,
    sep = "\t",
    header = FALSE,
    comment.char = "",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
    quote = ""
  )

  if (ncol(x) < 3) stop("BED has <3 columns: ", f)

  x <- x[, 1:3]
  colnames(x) <- c("seqnames", "start0", "end")

  gr <- GRanges(
    seqnames = x$seqnames,
    ranges = IRanges(start = x$start0 + 1L, end = x$end)
  )

  seqlevelsStyle(gr) <- "UCSC"
  gr
}

keep_ucsc_std <- function(gr, keep_chr) {
  gr <- keepStandardChromosomes(gr, pruning.mode = "coarse")
  gr <- gr[as.character(seqnames(gr)) %in% keep_chr]
  sort(gr)
}

calc_gc_percent <- function(seqs) {
  gc_count <- vcountPattern("G", seqs) + vcountPattern("C", seqs)
  (gc_count / width(seqs)) * 100
}

# -----------------------------
# 3) Find BED files
# -----------------------------
bed_files <- list.files(bed_dir, pattern = "\\.bed$", full.names = TRUE)

if (length(bed_files) == 0) {
  stop("No BED files found in: ", bed_dir)
}

message("Found ", length(bed_files), " BED files")

# -----------------------------
# 4) Process each BED
# -----------------------------
all_gc <- list()

for (f in bed_files) {
  nm <- sub("\\.bed$", "", basename(f))
  message("Processing: ", nm)

  gr <- bed_to_gr(f)
  gr <- keep_ucsc_std(gr, keep_chr)

  if (length(gr) == 0) {
    warning("Skipping empty/filtered BED: ", nm)
    next
  }

  seqs <- getSeq(genome, gr)
  keep <- grepl("^[ACGT]+$", as.character(seqs))

  gr <- gr[keep]
  seqs <- seqs[keep]

  if (length(gr) == 0) {
    warning("Skipping after ACGT filtering: ", nm)
    next
  }

  all_gc[[nm]] <- data.frame(
    group = nm,
    gc_percent = calc_gc_percent(seqs),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

gc_df <- do.call(rbind, all_gc)

if (is.null(gc_df) || nrow(gc_df) == 0) {
  stop("No intervals available after filtering.")
}

# -----------------------------
# 5) Order groups by median GC
# -----------------------------
med_df <- aggregate(gc_percent ~ group, data = gc_df, median)
colnames(med_df)[2] <- "median_gc_percent"
med_df <- med_df[order(med_df$median_gc_percent, decreasing = TRUE), ]

gc_df$group <- factor(gc_df$group, levels = med_df$group)

# -----------------------------
# 6) Plot to RStudio device
# -----------------------------
p <- ggplot(gc_df, aes(x = group, y = gc_percent)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.3) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "GC percentage per interval across BED files",
    subtitle = "Groups ordered by median GC%",
    x = "BED file / group",
    y = "GC percentage"
  )

print(p)
```

```{r}
p
```


```{r}
# ============================================================
# GC percentage per BED interval + styled rank-ordered boxplot
# Print in RStudio and save as PNG
# ============================================================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(GenomicRanges)
  library(GenomeInfoDb)
  library(BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38)
  library(Biostrings)
  library(ggplot2)
})

# -----------------------------
# 1) Input
# -----------------------------
bed_dir <- "Cluster_beds_200bp_Final/Promoter_R6/"
out_png <- file.path(bed_dir, "GC_percent_ranked_boxplot.png")

# -----------------------------
# 2) Genome
# -----------------------------
genome <- BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38
keep_chr <- seqlevels(genome)

# -----------------------------
# Helpers
# -----------------------------
bed_to_gr <- function(f) {
  x <- read.table(
    f,
    sep = "\t",
    header = FALSE,
    comment.char = "",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
    quote = ""
  )

  if (ncol(x) < 3) stop("BED has <3 columns: ", f)

  x <- x[, 1:3]
  colnames(x) <- c("seqnames", "start0", "end")

  gr <- GRanges(
    seqnames = x$seqnames,
    ranges = IRanges(start = x$start0 + 1L, end = x$end)
  )

  seqlevelsStyle(gr) <- "UCSC"
  gr
}

keep_ucsc_std <- function(gr, keep_chr) {
  gr <- keepStandardChromosomes(gr, pruning.mode = "coarse")
  gr <- gr[as.character(seqnames(gr)) %in% keep_chr]
  sort(gr)
}

calc_gc_percent <- function(seqs) {
  gc_count <- vcountPattern("G", seqs) + vcountPattern("C", seqs)
  (gc_count / width(seqs)) * 100
}

# -----------------------------
# 3) Find BED files
# -----------------------------
bed_files <- list.files(bed_dir, pattern = "\\.bed$", full.names = TRUE)

if (length(bed_files) == 0) {
  stop("No BED files found in: ", bed_dir)
}

message("Found ", length(bed_files), " BED files")

# -----------------------------
# 4) Process each BED
# -----------------------------
all_gc <- list()

for (f in bed_files) {
  nm <- sub("\\.bed$", "", basename(f))
  message("Processing: ", nm)

  gr <- bed_to_gr(f)
  gr <- keep_ucsc_std(gr, keep_chr)

  if (length(gr) == 0) {
    warning("Skipping empty/filtered BED: ", nm)
    next
  }

  seqs <- getSeq(genome, gr)
  keep <- grepl("^[ACGT]+$", as.character(seqs))

  gr <- gr[keep]
  seqs <- seqs[keep]

  if (length(gr) == 0) {
    warning("Skipping after ACGT filtering: ", nm)
    next
  }

  all_gc[[nm]] <- data.frame(
    group = nm,
    gc_percent = calc_gc_percent(seqs),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

gc_df <- do.call(rbind, all_gc)

if (is.null(gc_df) || nrow(gc_df) == 0) {
  stop("No intervals available after filtering.")
}

# -----------------------------
# 5) Order groups by median GC
# -----------------------------
med_df <- aggregate(gc_percent ~ group, data = gc_df, median)
colnames(med_df)[2] <- "median_gc_percent"
med_df <- med_df[order(med_df$median_gc_percent, decreasing = TRUE), ]

gc_df$group <- factor(gc_df$group, levels = med_df$group)

# -----------------------------
# 6) Styled plot
# -----------------------------
p <- ggplot(gc_df, aes(x = group, y = gc_percent)) +
  geom_boxplot(
    fill = "grey70",
    color = "black",
    outlier.shape = NA,
    width = 0.7,
    linewidth = 0.5
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100)) +
  labs(
    title = "GC percentage per interval across BED files",
    x = "",
    y = "GC percentage"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      angle = 60,
      hjust = 1,
      vjust = 1,
      color = "black"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black"),
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 1.2, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = 1.2, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.length = grid::unit(0.18, "cm"),
    plot.title = element_text(color = "black"),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 100),
    expand = c(0, 0),
    breaks = seq(0, 100, by = 20)
  )

# show in RStudio
print(p)

# save as PNG
ggsave(
  filename = out_png,
  plot = p,
  width = 10,
  height = 4,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

message("Saved PNG: ", out_png)
```








```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(GenomicRanges)
  library(GenomeInfoDb)
  library(BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38)
  library(Biostrings)
  library(SummarizedExperiment)
  library(monaLisa)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(TFBSTools)
  library(JASPAR2022)
})

set.seed(1)

pwm_list <- readRDS("JASPAR2022_human_mouse_curated_0.95_pwms.rds")

bed_dir <- "Cluster_beds_200bp_Final/Promoter_R6/"
fg_file <- file.path(bed_dir, "Promoter1.bed")
bg_file <- file.path(bed_dir, "Promoter_control_200bp_030326.bed")

outdir <- "MONALisa_Promoter1_scrambled_vs_control_seed1_noReduce"
dir.create(outdir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

bed_to_gr <- function(f) {
  x <- read.table(
    f, sep = "\t", header = FALSE, comment.char = "",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE, quote = ""
  )

  x <- x[, 1:3]
  colnames(x) <- c("seqnames", "start0", "end")

  gr <- GRanges(
    seqnames = x$seqnames,
    ranges = IRanges(start = x$start0 + 1L, end = x$end)
  )

  seqlevelsStyle(gr) <- "UCSC"
  gr
}

keep_ucsc_std <- function(gr, keep_chr) {
  gr <- keepStandardChromosomes(gr, pruning.mode = "coarse")
  gr <- gr[as.character(seqnames(gr)) %in% keep_chr]
  sort(gr)
}

filter_gr_acgt <- function(gr, genome) {
  if (length(gr) == 0) return(gr)
  s <- getSeq(genome, gr)
  keep <- grepl("^[ACGT]+$", as.character(s))
  gr[keep]
}

scramble_seqset_preserve_composition <- function(seqs) {
  scrambled <- vapply(as.character(seqs), function(x) {
    chars <- strsplit(x, "", fixed = TRUE)[[1]]
    paste(sample(chars, length(chars), replace = FALSE), collapse = "")
  }, character(1))
  DNAStringSet(scrambled)
}

gc_pct <- function(seqs) {
  100 * (vcountPattern("G", seqs) + vcountPattern("C", seqs)) / width(seqs)
}

se_to_table <- function(se) {
  data.frame(
    motif_id      = rowData(se)$motif.id,
    motif_name    = rowData(se)$motif.name,
    log2enr       = assay(se, "log2enr")[, "fg"],
    negLog10P     = assay(se, "negLog10P")[, "fg"],
    negLog10Padj  = assay(se, "negLog10Padj")[, "fg"],
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

genome <- BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38
keep_chr <- seqlevels(genome)

fg <- bed_to_gr(fg_file)
bg <- bed_to_gr(bg_file)

fg <- keep_ucsc_std(fg, keep_chr)
bg <- keep_ucsc_std(bg, keep_chr)

# IMPORTANT: do not reduce; preserve 200 bp intervals
fg <- filter_gr_acgt(fg, genome)
bg <- filter_gr_acgt(bg, genome)

message("Foreground width table:")
print(table(width(fg)))

message("Background width table:")
print(table(width(bg)))

fg_seq_original <- getSeq(genome, fg)
bg_seq <- getSeq(genome, bg)

fg_seq_scrambled <- scramble_seqset_preserve_composition(fg_seq_original)

message("GC identical before vs scrambled: ",
        all(gc_pct(fg_seq_original) == gc_pct(fg_seq_scrambled)))

# strip names just to be safe
names(fg_seq_scrambled) <- NULL
names(bg_seq) <- NULL

seqs <- c(fg_seq_scrambled, bg_seq)
bins <- factor(
  c(rep("fg", length(fg_seq_scrambled)), rep("bg", length(bg_seq))),
  levels = c("fg", "bg")
)

se <- calcBinnedMotifEnrR(
  seqs = seqs,
  bins = bins,
  pwmL = pwm_list,
  background = "otherBins",
  test = "fisher",
  verbose = TRUE
)

tab <- se_to_table(se)
tab <- tab[order(-tab$negLog10Padj, -tab$log2enr), ]

write.table(
  tab,
  file = file.path(outdir, "Promoter1_scrambled_motif_enrichment.tsv"),
  sep = "\t",
  quote = FALSE,
  row.names = FALSE
)

saveRDS(
  se,
  file = file.path(outdir, "Promoter1_scrambled_monaLisa.rds")
)

plot_df <- head(tab, 20)
plot_df$label <- ifelse(
  is.na(plot_df$motif_name) | plot_df$motif_name == "",
  plot_df$motif_id,
  paste0(plot_df$motif_name, " (", plot_df$motif_id, ")")
)
plot_df$label <- factor(plot_df$label, levels = rev(plot_df$label))

p <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = label, y = log2enr, fill = negLog10Padj)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    title = "Scrambled Promoter1 vs Promoter control",
    subtitle = "200 bp intervals preserved; base composition preserved within each interval",
    x = "Motif",
    y = "log2 enrichment"
  )

print(p)
```
```{r}
# ============================================================
# Compare unscrambled vs scrambled Promoter1 motif enrichment
# against Promoter_control_200bp_030326
# ============================================================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(GenomicRanges)
  library(GenomeInfoDb)
  library(BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38)
  library(Biostrings)
  library(SummarizedExperiment)
  library(monaLisa)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(TFBSTools)
  library(JASPAR2022)
})

set.seed(1)

# -----------------------------
# 0) Inputs
# -----------------------------
pwm_list <- readRDS("JASPAR2022_human_mouse_curated_0.95_pwms.rds")

bed_dir <- "Cluster_beds_200bp_Final/Promoter_R6/"
fg_file <- file.path(bed_dir, "Promoter1.bed")
bg_file <- file.path(bed_dir, "Promoter_control_200bp_030326.bed")

outdir <- "MONALisa_Promoter1_unscrambled_vs_scrambled_comparison_seed1"
dir.create(outdir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# -----------------------------
# Helpers
# -----------------------------
bed_to_gr <- function(f) {
  x <- read.table(
    f, sep = "\t", header = FALSE, comment.char = "",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE, quote = ""
  )

  if (ncol(x) < 3) stop("BED has <3 columns: ", f)

  x <- x[, 1:3]
  colnames(x) <- c("seqnames", "start0", "end")

  gr <- GRanges(
    seqnames = x$seqnames,
    ranges = IRanges(start = x$start0 + 1L, end = x$end)
  )

  seqlevelsStyle(gr) <- "UCSC"
  gr
}

keep_ucsc_std <- function(gr, keep_chr) {
  gr <- keepStandardChromosomes(gr, pruning.mode = "coarse")
  gr <- gr[as.character(seqnames(gr)) %in% keep_chr]
  sort(gr)
}

filter_gr_acgt <- function(gr, genome) {
  if (length(gr) == 0) return(gr)
  s <- getSeq(genome, gr)
  keep <- grepl("^[ACGT]+$", as.character(s))
  gr[keep]
}

scramble_seqset_preserve_composition <- function(seqs) {
  scrambled <- vapply(as.character(seqs), function(x) {
    chars <- strsplit(x, "", fixed = TRUE)[[1]]
    paste(sample(chars, length(chars), replace = FALSE), collapse = "")
  }, character(1))
  DNAStringSet(scrambled)
}

gc_pct <- function(seqs) {
  100 * (vcountPattern("G", seqs) + vcountPattern("C", seqs)) / width(seqs)
}

se_to_table <- function(se) {
  data.frame(
    motif_id      = rowData(se)$motif.id,
    motif_name    = rowData(se)$motif.name,
    log2enr       = assay(se, "log2enr")[, "fg"],
    negLog10P     = assay(se, "negLog10P")[, "fg"],
    negLog10Padj  = assay(se, "negLog10Padj")[, "fg"],
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

run_monalisa <- function(fg_seq, bg_seq, pwm_list) {
  names(fg_seq) <- NULL
  names(bg_seq) <- NULL

  seqs <- c(fg_seq, bg_seq)
  bins <- factor(
    c(rep("fg", length(fg_seq)), rep("bg", length(bg_seq))),
    levels = c("fg", "bg")
  )

  calcBinnedMotifEnrR(
    seqs = seqs,
    bins = bins,
    pwmL = pwm_list,
    background = "otherBins",
    test = "fisher",
    verbose = TRUE
  )
}

# -----------------------------
# 1) Load intervals
# -----------------------------
genome <- BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38
keep_chr <- seqlevels(genome)

fg <- bed_to_gr(fg_file)
bg <- bed_to_gr(bg_file)

fg <- keep_ucsc_std(fg, keep_chr)
bg <- keep_ucsc_std(bg, keep_chr)

# Keep original 200 bp intervals
fg <- filter_gr_acgt(fg, genome)
bg <- filter_gr_acgt(bg, genome)

message("Foreground width table:")
print(table(width(fg)))

message("Background width table:")
print(table(width(bg)))

# -----------------------------
# 2) Extract sequences
# -----------------------------
fg_seq_original <- getSeq(genome, fg)
bg_seq <- getSeq(genome, bg)

fg_seq_scrambled <- scramble_seqset_preserve_composition(fg_seq_original)

message("GC identical before vs scrambled: ",
        all(gc_pct(fg_seq_original) == gc_pct(fg_seq_scrambled)))

# -----------------------------
# 3) Run MonaLisa
# -----------------------------
message("Running unscrambled Promoter1...")
se_uns <- run_monalisa(fg_seq_original, bg_seq, pwm_list)

message("Running scrambled Promoter1...")
se_scr <- run_monalisa(fg_seq_scrambled, bg_seq, pwm_list)

# -----------------------------
# 4) Save raw results
# -----------------------------
saveRDS(se_uns, file = file.path(outdir, "Promoter1_unscrambled_monaLisa.rds"))
saveRDS(se_scr, file = file.path(outdir, "Promoter1_scrambled_monaLisa.rds"))

tab_uns <- se_to_table(se_uns)
tab_scr <- se_to_table(se_scr)

tab_uns <- tab_uns[order(-tab_uns$negLog10Padj, -tab_uns$log2enr), ]
tab_scr <- tab_scr[order(-tab_scr$negLog10Padj, -tab_scr$log2enr), ]

write.table(
  tab_uns,
  file = file.path(outdir, "Promoter1_unscrambled_motif_enrichment.tsv"),
  sep = "\t",
  quote = FALSE,
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.table(
  tab_scr,
  file = file.path(outdir, "Promoter1_scrambled_motif_enrichment.tsv"),
  sep = "\t",
  quote = FALSE,
  row.names = FALSE
)

# -----------------------------
# 5) Compare top motifs from unscrambled
# -----------------------------
n_top <- 20

top_uns <- head(tab_uns, n_top)

comp_df <- merge(
  top_uns[, c("motif_id", "motif_name", "log2enr", "negLog10Padj")],
  tab_scr[, c("motif_id", "motif_name", "log2enr", "negLog10Padj")],
  by = c("motif_id", "motif_name"),
  suffixes = c("_unscrambled", "_scrambled"),
  all.x = TRUE
)

comp_df$label <- ifelse(
  is.na(comp_df$motif_name) | comp_df$motif_name == "",
  comp_df$motif_id,
  paste0(comp_df$motif_name, " (", comp_df$motif_id, ")")
)

# keep order from unscrambled ranking
comp_df$label <- factor(comp_df$label, levels = rev(comp_df$label[order(comp_df$negLog10Padj_unscrambled)]))

write.table(
  comp_df,
  file = file.path(outdir, "Promoter1_unscrambled_vs_scrambled_topMotifs_comparison.tsv"),
  sep = "\t",
  quote = FALSE,
  row.names = FALSE
)

# long format for plotting
plot_df <- rbind(
  data.frame(
    label = comp_df$label,
    condition = "Unscrambled",
    log2enr = comp_df$log2enr_unscrambled,
    negLog10Padj = comp_df$negLog10Padj_unscrambled,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  ),
  data.frame(
    label = comp_df$label,
    condition = "Scrambled",
    log2enr = comp_df$log2enr_scrambled,
    negLog10Padj = comp_df$negLog10Padj_scrambled,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
)

plot_df$condition <- factor(plot_df$condition, levels = c("Unscrambled", "Scrambled"))

# -----------------------------
# 6) Plot comparison of log2 enrichment
# -----------------------------
p1 <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = label, y = log2enr, fill = condition)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.7) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
  labs(
    title = "Promoter1 motif enrichment: unscrambled vs scrambled",
    subtitle = paste0("Top ", n_top, " motifs ranked from unscrambled Promoter1"),
    x = "Motif",
    y = "log2 enrichment"
  )

print(p1)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(outdir, "Promoter1_unscrambled_vs_scrambled_topMotifs_log2enr.png"),
  plot = p1,
  width = 9,
  height = 6,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

# -----------------------------
# 7) Optional second plot: delta enrichment
# -----------------------------
comp_df$delta_log2enr <- comp_df$log2enr_unscrambled - comp_df$log2enr_scrambled
comp_df$label_delta <- factor(
  comp_df$label,
  levels = rev(comp_df$label[order(comp_df$delta_log2enr)])
)

p2 <- ggplot(comp_df, aes(x = label_delta, y = delta_log2enr)) +
  geom_col(fill = "grey60", color = "black", width = 0.7) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
  labs(
    title = "Difference in motif enrichment",
    subtitle = "Unscrambled minus scrambled Promoter1",
    x = "Motif",
    y = "Delta log2 enrichment"
  )

print(p2)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(outdir, "Promoter1_unscrambled_minus_scrambled_delta_log2enr.png"),
  plot = p2,
  width = 8,
  height = 6,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

message("Done. Outputs in: ", outdir)
```
